## 🐛 Bug Report

Thank you for taking the time to report this! Please fill in as much detail as possible to help us reproduce and fix the issue quickly.

---

### App Version

> Find this in: **Settings → About → Version**

**Version:** e.g., 2.3.0

---

### Platform & OS

**Platform:**
- [ ] iOS
- [ ] Android
- [ ] macOS

**OS Version:** e.g., iOS 17.5 / Android 14 / macOS 14.5

**Device Model:** e.g., iPhone 15, Pixel 8, MacBook Pro M3

---

### Bug Description

> A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

<!-- Write your description here -->

---

### Steps to Reproduce

> Please provide exact steps to reproduce the issue.

1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. Scroll to '...'
4. See the error / unexpected behavior

---

### Expected Behavior

> What did you expect to happen?

<!-- Write expected behavior here -->

---

### Actual Behavior

> What actually happened instead?

<!-- Write actual behavior here -->

---

### Screenshots / Screen Recordings

> If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording to help explain the issue.

<!-- Drag and drop images or video here, or paste a link -->

---

### Additional Context

> Any other information that might be relevant:
> - Does it happen every time or intermittently?
> - Did it work before a recent update?
> - Are you using encrypted backups or Google Drive?
> - Any specific Persian calendar dates or events involved?

<!-- Add any other context here -->

---

*Before submitting, please ensure you are on the latest version of Yadavar and have searched [existing issues](../../issues) to avoid duplicates. Thank you! 🙏*
